item.text:
`just coder-startup` did not complete successfully. It confirmed the active worktree and branch as `wt-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Artifact-Family-v1` on `feat/WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Artifact-Family-v1`, then failed during `gov-check` because Node hit `spawnSync git EPERM`. It also showed existing unstaged governance changes in `.GOV/roles_shared/BUILD_ORDER.md`, `.GOV/roles_shared/TASK_BOARD.md`, and `.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Artifact-Family-v1.md`.

`just coder-next WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Artifact-Family-v1` completed and reported the lifecycle as:
- `WP_ID`: `WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Artifact-Family-v1`
- `STAGE`: `BOOTSTRAP`

- `OPERATOR_ACTION`: `NONE`
- `STATE`: coder claim/bootstrap commit is missing; resume at `BOOTSTRAP`

It also reported:

- bootstrap claim commit: missing
- skeleton checkpoint: missing
- skeleton approval: missing
